item.title: Farm Tire Handles Road Travel Well
item.description: A farm vehicle tire performs reliably during road travel. Focus on durability, load handling, and real-world conditions for agricultural equipment in motion.

media:content.media:title: Farm Tire Handles Road Travel Well
media:content.media:description: A farm vehicle tire performs reliably during road travel. Focus on durability, load handling, and real-world conditions for agricultural equipment in motion.

item.title: Testing a New Farm Tractor in the Field
item.description: A field test of a new farm tractor under real working conditions. Focus on performance, handling, and practical use for modern agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: Testing a New Farm Tractor in the Field
media:content.media:description: A field test of a new farm tractor under real working conditions. Focus on performance, handling, and practical use for modern agricultural operations.

item.title: Planter Operator Mix-Up on the Farm
item.description: A farming operation experiences a planter operator mix-up. Shows coordination challenges, field work adjustments, and keeping planting on track during busy conditions.

media:content.media:title: Planter Operator Mix-Up on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A farming operation experiences a planter operator mix-up. Shows coordination challenges, field work adjustments, and keeping planting on track during busy conditions.

item.title: New Tractors Return to Field Work
item.description: New tractors get back to work on the farm. Focus on productivity, field operations, and getting modern equipment running efficiently for daily agricultural tasks.

media:content.media:title: New Tractors Return to Field Work
media:content.media:description: New tractors get back to work on the farm. Focus on productivity, field operations, and getting modern equipment running efficiently for daily agricultural tasks.

item.title: Truck Drivers Learn Importance of Timing
item.description: A lesson in how timing impacts trucking operations. Shows coordination, delivery schedules, and how proper timing improves efficiency and safety on the road.

media:content.media:title: Truck Drivers Learn Importance of Timing
media:content.media:description: A lesson in how timing impacts trucking operations. Shows coordination, delivery schedules, and how proper timing improves efficiency and safety on the road.

item.title: Corn Harvest Progress on the Farm
item.description: Corn harvest is moving smoothly with steady field operations. Focus on harvesting equipment, crop yield, and efficient teamwork during a productive season.

media:content.media:title: Corn Harvest Progress on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Corn harvest is moving smoothly with steady field operations. Focus on harvesting equipment, crop yield, and efficient teamwork during a productive season.

item.title: Bean Harvest in Wide Field Passes
item.description: Large-scale bean harvesting using wide equipment passes. Shows efficient field coverage, crop collection, and coordinated machinery work during harvest season.

media:content.media:title: Bean Harvest in Wide Field Passes
media:content.media:description: Large-scale bean harvesting using wide equipment passes. Shows efficient field coverage, crop collection, and coordinated machinery work during harvest season.

item.title: Off-Road Side-by-Side Test Drive
item.description: A quick test drive of a side-by-side vehicle in real off-road conditions. Focus on handling, speed, and performance across rough terrain.

media:content.media:title: Off-Road Side-by-Side Test Drive
media:content.media:description: A quick test drive of a side-by-side vehicle in real off-road conditions. Focus on handling, speed, and performance across rough terrain.

item.title: Upgrading a Combine with Track Conversion
item.description: A combine harvester gets a track system upgrade for improved traction and field performance. Focus on installation, machinery improvement, and farm efficiency.

media:content.media:title: Upgrading a Combine with Track Conversion
media:content.media:description: A combine harvester gets a track system upgrade for improved traction and field performance. Focus on installation, machinery improvement, and farm efficiency.

item.title: Quad Tractor Breaks Down in the Field
item.description: A quad tractor experiences a breakdown during field work. Shows troubleshooting, repair efforts, and keeping large farm equipment running under pressure.

media:content.media:title: Quad Tractor Breaks Down in the Field
media:content.media:description: A quad tractor experiences a breakdown during field work. Shows troubleshooting, repair efforts, and keeping large farm equipment running under pressure.

item.title: Overhauling a Heavy-Duty Winch System
item.description: A full maintenance overhaul of a D4 Hyster winch system. Shows inspection, repair, and rebuilding steps to restore reliable performance for heavy farm and recovery work.

media:content.media:title: Overhauling a Heavy-Duty Winch System
media:content.media:description: A full maintenance overhaul of a D4 Hyster winch system. Shows inspection, repair, and rebuilding steps to restore reliable performance for heavy farm and recovery work.
